@startuml
class "Module" {
    EL_metadata : object
    
    num_cells_x : int 
    Num_cells_y : int  
    num_cells : int 
    
    make : str   
    model : str    
    serial_number : str  
    
    parallel_strings : int   
    
    cell_IV  : Array of float64
   
   --Getters--
     +EL_metadadata()
     
      ---Setters---
       -EL_metadada()
       
        ----Methods----
         find_max_exposure ()
          is_EL_metadata_sorted()


}



 class ELMetadata{
 filepath:str
 
 module_voltage:float
module_current:float
exposure:float
temperature:float

cell_highest_pixel:list
cell_voltage_array:list
cell_current_array:list 

- Getters -
+filepath()
+module_voltate()
+module_currentr()
+ exposure()
+ temperature()
+ cell_highesr_pixcel()

-setter-
-filepath()
-module_volatge()
-mudule_currnet()
-exposurw()
-temperture()
-cell_highestr_pizel()




 }
 Module <|-- ELMetadata 


@enduml
